_comment: Sample index served from this repository. install.bundled lets the packaged gallery install the starter widgets without network access. The `requires` field is a display-only gallery badge for widgets that need an external CLI/runtime. `category` is an optional curated grouping surfaced as gallery filter chips (falls back to `tags`). `screenshot` (optional, http(s)/file URL) renders a preview thumbnail.
name: barshelf official registry

widgets.name: Today
widgets.description: Native Calendar/Clock-style date widget with a large day number — the layout adapts to the widget size (small / medium / large) like a native iOS/macOS widget. No external dependency.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: Recent Files
widgets.description: Stashbar-style recent files with a Grid/List view toggle and adjustable thumbnail size. QuickLook thumbnails that drag out to Finder/apps and open on click. Inspired by https://github.com/jiunbae/stashbar.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: Battery
widgets.description: Native-style battery widget — a big percentage and a level-colored meter with a matching battery glyph, read from pmset. Pure workflow, no Deno.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: aas Usage
widgets.description: LLM account usage as native, health-colored meter bars from `aas usage --json` — per-account cards built with the meter display. See https://github.com/Open330/aas. Requires the aas CLI.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: OTP Codes
widgets.description: One-time password codes straight from your OTPeek vault with a countdown ring and one-tap copy — see https://github.com/jiunbae/otpeek. Requires the otpeek CLI and a configured vault (the vault password is read from the macOS Keychain).
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: New Downloads
widgets.description: Counts files in a folder and shows how many were added or removed since your last check, persisting the count across refreshes with the workflow storage layer.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: Visit Counter
widgets.description: Counts how many times you've opened it and remembers first/previous visit times across restarts using the workflow storage layer. A persistence demo. No external dependency.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: GitHub Status
widgets.description: Fetches GitHub's public status JSON over HTTPS and refreshes when your Mac wakes — an HTTP-source example.
widgets.author: barshelf
